title: 'We are totally destroying terrorist regime': Trump issues 'watch what happens today 'warning
summary_full: President Trump declared a decisive campaign against Iran, vowing to "destroy the terrorist regime" militarily and economically. He asserted US military superiority, claiming Iran's capabilities are being "decimated."  Trump issued a stern warning to Tehran's leadership, highlighting the US's "unparalleled firepower" and his personal resolve as the 47th President to counter Iran's global actions.
